title: Hana's Paxel Mod
description: Adds Paxel tools that combine the power of a Pickaxe, Shovel, and an Axe!
body:
This mod adds Paxels that combines the power of Pickaxes, Shovels, and Axes into a single powerful tool.
Right-clicking logs will strip them, and right-clicking dirt will path it. 

### Tools
- Wooden Paxel
- Stone Paxel
- Iron Paxel
- Golden Paxel
- Diamond Paxel
- Netherite Paxel
### Requires Fabric API
